---
title: "Hands-on Exercise 5"
page-layout: custom
---

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

::::::::::::: tech-stack-row
::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
1
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX05/images/ho_ex05a_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 5-A]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="/HO_EX/HO_EX05HO_EX05A.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
2
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX05/images/ho_ex05b_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 5-B]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="/HO_EX/HO_EX05/HO_EX05B.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
3
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX05/images/ho_ex05c_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 5-C]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="/HO_EX/HO_EX05/HO_EX05C.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
4
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX05/images/ho_ex05d_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 5-D]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="/HO_EX/HO_EX05/HO_EX05D.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
5
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX05/images/ho_ex05e_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 5-E]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="/HO_EX/HO_EX05/HO_EX05E.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::
:::::::::::::
